title: Thai-Style Polish Pork Dumplings
description: A twist on traditional pork dumplings, infused with Thai flavors and spices. Pillowy soft dumplings filled with tender pork, perfect for a unique dinner experience.
instructions: Combine pork, pilau rice, fish sauce, soy sauce, coriander, paprika, and salt in a mixing bowl.
Knead the mixture until it forms a cohesive dough.
Divide the dough into small portions and shape into balls.
Wrap each ball with a soft polish sausage slice.
Heat a non-stick pan with a small amount of oil and cook the dumplings until golden brown.
Add 2 pandanus leaves to the pan and steam the dumplings for 5 minutes.
Serve hot with green onions garnished on top.
